name: ai-chat-messages
title: AI Chat Messages
description: Transcript region that anchors to the newest message, pauses when the reader scrolls up, and counts what arrived meanwhile.

props.name: children
props.description: The message elements. The child count drives arrival detection.

props.name: autoScroll
props.description: Follow new messages while the reader is already at the bottom.

props.name: onReachLatest
props.description: Fired when the reader returns to the latest message — useful for clearing an unread badge.

props.name: jumpLabel
props.description: Copy for the jump control when nothing new has arrived.

clinicalNotes: Auto-scroll stops the moment a clinician scrolls up: yanking the viewport back down while someone is re-reading a dose or a lab value is how misreads happen. New messages that arrive meanwhile are counted on the jump control instead of being scrolled past silently. The region is a role="log" with polite announcements, so a screen-reader user hears additions without losing their place. Never remove prior messages to tidy the transcript — the sequence is the audit trail, and retention policy belongs to your product.
notes: Arrival detection uses React.Children.count, so keep messages as direct children rather than wrapping them in a single fragment.
